Rare card choice: Immolate, Fiend Fire, or Offering. Immolate is a MUST-TAKE - 21+7 AOE damage, solves AOE gap AND single target damage. Perfect for Guardian (burst damage for Mode Shift). Fiend Fire is good exhaust but needs FNP. Offering is great energy but Immolate fills more gaps.

Elite fight #1 at F7. At 84% HP with Bash+, Immolate, Shrug It Off, Colorless Potion. Strong position.

FIGHT STRATEGY - Gremlin Nob
FIGHT TYPE: Elite (play ZERO Skills after T1)
WIN CONDITION: Kill in 3-4 turns with Attacks only. Bash+ for Vulnerable, Immolate for burst.
ZERO DAMAGE PLAN: No blocking - pure race. T1 is free (Bellow). After T1, only Attacks.
KEY CARDS: Bash+ (Vuln 3 turns), Immolate (21 AOE), Strikes
POTION PLAN: Colorless Potion if I need extra damage/block
RISKS: Skill-heavy draws after T1. Nob gains +2/+3 Str per Skill played.

RISKS: 20 damage attacks. Siphon Soul -1 Str/-1 Dex compounds. At only 41 HP.
